name: Master V-dramon

signature_move.name: V-Breath Arrow
signature_move.description: Spews a high-temperature V-shaped heat ray from its mouth.

description: D1 Tamers ⇨ Japanese A Mythical Dragon Digimon! V-dramon's final form, having awakened to true power. V-Breath Arrow A technique in which it spews a V-shaped high-temperature heat ray from its mouth. It is extraordinarily potent, and entirely effective against even powerful Digimon! Digimon Adventure 02: D1 Tamers ⇨ English げんりゅうがた デジモン！ ブイドラモンが しんの チカラに めざめた さいしゅう けいたい ブイブレスアロー Ｖがたのコウネツの ねっせんをクチから はきだすワザ ケタハズレのイリョク がありキョウリョクな デジモンにも じゅうぶんきくぞ！ デジモンアドベンチャー02 ディーワンテイマーズ ⇨ English Template:K ⇨ English Template:K ⇨ English Template:K ⇨ English Template:K ⇨ English Template:K ⇨ English Template:K ⇨ English Template:K ⇨ English Template:K ⇨ English Template:K ⇨ English Template:K
